props.value: Injury — the pain field over a guarded reach

A softball hits the chest, then the body reaches for the green goal while GUARDING the injury (the guard emerges from a pain cost — nobody authored it). Each joint glows with pain: cold slate → orange → hot red, sized by intensity. Chest stays hottest, then fades. Scrub the timeline and watch it bloom and settle.
frame {injury.frame} / 106  ·  pain blooms ~frame 10, peaks mid-reach, fades by the end
